# FSItem.Identifier.invalid

**Case**

The identifier for an invalid item.

## Declaration

```swift
case invalid
```

## Working with special identifiers

- **FSItem.Identifier.parentOfRoot**: The identifier for an item that serves as the parent of the root directory.
- **FSItem.Identifier.rootDirectory**: The item identifier for the root directory.

items.description: The identifier for an item that serves as the parent of the root directory.
items.name: FSItem.Identifier.parentOfRoot

items.description: The item identifier for the root directory.
items.name: FSItem.Identifier.rootDirectory
